verses.name: 2 John 1:1
verses.text: The elder, to the chosen lady and her children, whom I love in truth; and not I only, but also all those who know the truth;

verses.name: 2 John 1:2
verses.text: for the truth’s sake, which remains in us, and it will be with us forever:

verses.name: 2 John 1:3
verses.text: Grace, mercy, and peace will be with us, from God the Father, and from the Lord Jesus Christ, the Son of the Father, in truth and love.

verses.name: 2 John 1:4
verses.text: I rejoice greatly that I have found some of your children walking in truth, even as we have been commanded by the Father.

verses.name: 2 John 1:5
verses.text: Now I beg you, dear lady, not as though I wrote to you a new commandment, but that which we had from the beginning, that we love one another.

verses.name: 2 John 1:6
verses.text: This is love, that we should walk according to his commandments. This is the commandment, even as you heard from the beginning, that you should walk in it.

verses.name: 2 John 1:7
verses.text: For many deceivers have gone out into the world, those who don’t confess that Jesus Christ came in the flesh. This is the deceiver and the Antichrist.

verses.name: 2 John 1:8
verses.text: Watch yourselves, that we don’t lose the things which we have accomplished, but that we receive a full reward.

verses.name: 2 John 1:9
verses.text: Whoever transgresses and doesn’t remain in the teaching of Christ, doesn’t have God. He who remains in the teaching, the same has both the Father and the Son.

verses.name: 2 John 1:10
verses.text: If anyone comes to you, and doesn’t bring this teaching, don’t receive him into your house, and don’t welcome him,

verses.name: 2 John 1:11
verses.text: for he who welcomes him participates in his evil works.

verses.name: 2 John 1:12
verses.text: Having many things to write to you, I don’t want to do so with paper and ink, but I hope to come to you, and to speak face to face, that our joy may be made full.

verses.name: 2 John 1:13
verses.text: The children of your chosen sister greet you. Amen.
